name: Garden Spread
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup MIRACLE WHIP or MIRACLE WHIP
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the Miracle Whip with finely chopped cucumber and tomato.
2. Add crushed dried basil leaves, salt, and pepper to the mixture.
3. Stir until well combined.
4. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Makes 1 cup.
